creator: pgj@FreeBSD.org
text:
I am still seeing this issue with vlc 3.0.11 (portversion: 3.0.11_9,4).  Then I found that a bug was fixed in the upstream regarding the handling of WEBM WebVTT subtitles [1].  I manually updated the port to 3.0.11.1 (3.0.11.1-0-g52483f3ca2, see the patch attached) and it solved the problem for me.

[1] https://www.videolan.org/developers/vlc-branch/NEWS
